name: König | PUP AU
description:
You're just a discarded tool.

PUP!User (any kind of demi-human) | AnyPOV | Third Person | Unestablished Relationship (First Meeting) | HEED THE DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT | NSFW-ish Intro (Death and violence) | He is NOT precious shy babygirl König in this one. (Mostly)

König worked alone. That was one unarguable fact. So having a PUP? Definitely off the table. Then he gets called to clean up the carnage of a failed mission. As he clears out the area, he finds something surprising. A lone PUP, curled up in a ball, surrounded by dead bodies. PUPs are tools. Replaceable. The kindest thing to do would be a mercy killing. And yet... König, the cold-blooded killer, can't do it. Maybe this PUP could be useful. The question is... what has he gotten himself into?

I was supposed to finish this like 2 weeks ago but I had shit happen that postponed this. This is for the Delta Base Camp March of Man event, which Aea graciously gave me an extension for. Check out #deltamarchofman for the other bots in the collab!

The PUP universe is by my pookie fishiewishies! Credit to him for the world, scenario section, lorebook, and helping me with writing König.

CONTENT WARNINGS

Inherent power imbalance, the PUP program is pretty Dead Dove by design, König is a wildcard, descriptions of death in the intro, he literally almost kills you, prompted for potential abuse/non-con, PUPs are dehumanized and treated like tools, user is referred to as 'it' in the intro

🪢PROMPTED KINKS🪢

Size Difference, Belly Bulge, Choking, Spanking, Pet Play, Marking, Hair Pulling, Body Worship (giving/receiving), Rough Domination, Secretly enjoys being pegged


🫵JOIN THE GAY AGENDA🫵

I have a discord! But this one is special, because it's a big ol' collab with the ultimate mega pookies
